title: feat(widgets): introduce `configureRelatedItems` as experimental
body:
This PR introduces a new set of experimental widgets:

- `EXPERIMENTAL_configureRelatedItems`
- `EXPERIMENTAL_connectConfigureRelatedItems`

Combined with the `hits` component, these widgets allow to create related items experiences as seen in e-commerce and media use cases:

![Example](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/6137112/69717292-12bedf00-110c-11ea-9a47-8ddd7c8ed2a6.png)

<details>

<summary>See more examples</summary>

![Example](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/6137112/69970627-d54cbe00-151e-11ea-85bc-04304077f78e.png)

![Example](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/6270048/67220965-ff449800-f42a-11e9-9896-2db8adb9b786.png)

</details>

## Usage

Given this hit:

```json
{
  "name": "Amazon - Fire TV Stick with Alexa Voice Remote - Black",
  "description": "Enjoy smart access to videos [...]",
  "brand": "Amazon",
  "categories": ["TV & Home Theater", "Streaming Media Players"],
  "hierarchicalCategories": {
    "lvl0": "TV & Home Theater",
    "lvl1": "TV & Home Theater > Streaming Media Players"
  },
  "type": "Streaming media plyr",
  "price": 39.99,
  "price_range": "1 - 50",
  "image": "https://cdn-demo.algolia.com/bestbuy-0118/5477500_sb.jpg",
  "url": "https://api.bestbuy.com/click/-/5477500/pdp",
  "free_shipping": false,
  "rating": 4,
  "popularity": 21469,
  "objectID": "5477500",
  "__position": 1
}
```

And these options:

```js
configureRelatedItems({
  hit,
  matchingPatterns: {
    brand: { score: 3 },
    type: { score: 10 },
    categories: { score: 2 },
  },
});
```

The following search parameters will be computed:

```json
{
  "facets": [],
  "disjunctiveFacets": [],
  "hierarchicalFacets": [],
  "facetsRefinements": {},
  "facetsExcludes": {},
  "disjunctiveFacetsRefinements": {},
  "numericRefinements": {},
  "tagRefinements": [],
  "hierarchicalFacetsRefinements": {},
  "index": "instant_search",
  "hitsPerPage": 5,
  "sumOrFiltersScores": true,
  "filters": "NOT objectID:5477500",
  "optionalFilters": [
    ["brand:Amazon<score=3>"],
    ["type:Streaming media plyr<score=10>"],
    [
      [
        "categories:TV & Home Theater<score=2>",
        "categories:Streaming Media Players<score=2>"
      ]
    ]
  ]
}
```

[Learn more about how scores work in Algolia →](https://www.algolia.com/doc/guides/managing-results/refine-results/merchandising-and-promoting/in-depth/optional-filter-scoring/)

The search parameters will then be set in the index to display related items with a `hits` widget.

## Implementation

Since this is an experimental widget, I didn't add logic in `connectConfigure` but rather created a connector called `connectConfigureRelatedItems` that Vue InstantSearch and Angular InstantSearch can rely on.

## Preview

[See story →](https://deploy-preview-4233--instantsearchjs.netlify.com/stories/?path=/story/basics-configurerelateditems--default)

## Related

- [RFC](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch-rfcs/blob/7871af03c80cb6ab87c47d82cc8c1f78da0a5e51/accepted/related-items.md)
